forkSubtext: Start your own trip from this itinerary — free, 30 seconds.

itinerary.heading: Day-by-day itinerary
itinerary.subheading: {days} days, morning to night. Built for a group, easy to bend.

pois.heading: Where to go
pois.subheading: Real, vetted spots. Click any to open in Maps.

cta.heading: Take {city} on with your crew
cta.body: Fork this itinerary into WePlanify, invite the group, and plan the trip together. Shared itinerary, polls, shared budget — all free.
